description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, minimalist design with a light wood finish and a rectangular shape. The front side displays seven drawers arranged in two rows, each equipped with small, round black knobs for easy access. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and back are plain, with the same light wood texture, giving the piece a cohesive and clean appearance. The construction appears sturdy, likely made from engineered wood or laminate, and the drawers are flush with the frame, emphasizing the streamlined look. There are no visible decorative embellishments, locks, or branding on the exterior.
description: A light wood chest of drawers with seven black-knobbed drawers and a flat, spacious top. The design is minimalist and modern, with a smooth, cohesive finish.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain, flat panel with a light wood finish and no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a simple, unadorned panel with the same light wood texture, showing the depth of the chest.
description_view_2: The front view displays seven drawers with round black knobs, highlighting the main functional aspect of the chest.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain, light wood panel with no additional features.
